Dark Map

A dark-themed basemap optimized for displaying dense datasets and dashboards.

Characteristics

  • Dark background
  • High contrast for bright data layers
  • Reduced eye strain in low-light environments

Best Use Cases

  • Monitoring dashboards
  • Dense thematic data
  • Presentations

Limitations

  • Less intuitive for geographic orientation
  • Not ideal for printed outputs

Suggested Images

  • Night-style dashboard
  • Heatmap on dark background
